title: 3 Pilea Peperomoides Coin Plant Indoor Morden Looking House Plant in 17cm Pot
features: You are welcome to buy 1, 2 or 3 pot(s) of Pilea Peperomoides Coin Plant in 17cm grower's pot.
Also called the Chinese money plant, coin plant, pancake plant, UFO plant and pass it on plant.
Coin Plants are easy to grow modern looking houseplants They grow well in dry conditions, can adapt to low light areas, and are fast-growing, making them low-maintenance
Pilea peperomioides are easy to grow modern looking houseplants. They are known for their bright green, coin-shaped leaves.
description: They grow well in dry conditions, can adapt to low light areas, and are fast-growing, making them low-maintenance, whether you're a newbie to houseplants or a seasoned expert, a Pilea peperomioides plant is sure to be a welcome addition to any indoor plant collection. HOW TO CARE Light Your Pilea prefers bright, indirect light. Rotate it at least 2-3 times a week since it grows towards the sun. Water Water your Pilea when the top 75% of the soil is dry. Humidity This plant does not require any extra humidity and does well in a drier environment. Temperature Your Pilea will be happiest in normal household temperatures between 65-75 degrees. However, make sure that your Pilea does not sit near the heating vents in the winter, as it may drop its leaves.
